Case Narrative

In brief, for the investigating officer:

  • A total of Rs 4,159,021.08 was moved across the accounts in this case.
  • VAISHALI TIWARI sent out Rs 2,607,950.00, which was the largest source of funds.
  • HARI spread money to 10 different accounts.
  • M/S CRYSTAL MARKETING collected money from 5 different accounts.
  • Rs 132,831,380.50 of incoming funds was traced to onward transfers or withdrawals, while Rs 6,889,125.00 could not be fully traced.
  • The account to investigate first is M/S GOLDEN RETAIL, which shows the strongest combination of suspicious behaviors in this case.

M/S GOLDEN RETAIL strong
acct_017 · Bandhan Bank · Account Number 99572217148131 · Score 3,610
Rank #1

The account M/S GOLDEN RETAIL (99572217148131) exhibits suspicious money behavior, with large credit transactions and subsequent debits, indicating potential money laundering or structuring activities. The account's transactions also show patterns of systematic transaction reversal and round-value debits. These activities warrant further investigation.

  • Money Trail Tracing strong — A credit of 2820000.00 on 2025-04-07 was traced into 6 subsequent debits, with 2819974.00 allocated and 26.00 remaining untraced. (+3 more of this type)
  • Structuring Smurfing Detection strong — 40 credit transactions totaling 4823180.00 were made on 2025-04-04, each below the individual cutoff, indicating potential structuring. (+2 more of this type)

  • Failed Reversed Transaction Detection weak — A debit of 30271.00 was followed by a near-equal credit of 30271.00 with explicit reversal evidence, indicating a potential failed reversed transaction. (+1 more of this type)
  • Money Flow Graph Construction structural — A money-flow graph with 54 nodes and 63 directed transaction edges was constructed, showing complex transaction relationships.
  • Reversal Clusters weak — The account has 4 debit-reversal pairs, indicating systematic transaction reversal activity.
  • Round Value Debit Patterns weak — 50 suspicious round-value debits totaling 11128000.00 were made, with repeated amounts, such as 75,000 x7 and 100,000 x6.

Generated by the Survey Corps Investigation Engine for CIDECODE · Run run_20260704_194613 · 04 July 2026, 19:59. All findings are investigative leads requiring independent verification.

Data Security & Method (Appendix)

What stays on this machine

  • All fraud detection, scoring and ranking run on this machine (deterministic code).
  • Raw bank statements and extracted transactions never leave the machine.
  • The money-flow graph, clusters and suspicion scores are computed locally.

What is sent to an external service

  • Only small, redacted text samples are sent to the language model to describe a statement's column layout when local parsing is insufficient.
  • For images / scanned PDFs, the page pixels are sent to a vision model (the one unavoidable case).
  • The language model only rewrites explanations into plain language; it never changes a number, account, or decision.
